# Auto-generated hash-pinned lock file for proxy dependencies.
# DO NOT edit manually.
#
# To regenerate this file with current hashes, run:
#   ./scripts/update-lock-files.sh
#
# Install with:
#   pip install --require-hashes -r proxy/requirements-lock.txt
#
# When this file contains pinned packages (lines not starting with '#'),
# the proxy/Dockerfile will automatically use --require-hashes.
# Until then, the Dockerfile falls back to proxy/requirements.txt.
